form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Horsham (27.95) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 12 length fourth. Has three wins and four placings from nine starts from the draw. Makes appeal on best.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a quick early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (23.81) over 425m at Bendigo. Forward showing expected.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Sandown (29.75) in a Grade 5 FIN, finishing a 6 length fifth. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (26.04) over 460m at Warragul. Drawn awkwardly. Has to do a bit more.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (25.78) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 10 length sixth. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from five starts. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (30.43) at The Meadows in a Mix 3/4, finishing fifth and beaten 5 lengths. Super consistent from the draw with a win and two places from three starts. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (30.43) at The Meadows in a Mix 3/4, finishing fifth and beaten 5 lengths. Super consistent from the draw with a win and two places from three starts. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split last time, hitting the frame with a 6 length third (23.50) over 410m at Horsham and making it two placings on end. Solid showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split last time, hitting the frame with a 6 length third (23.50) over 410m at Horsham and making it two placings on end. Solid showing expected.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by a nose over 500m at Bendigo in a handy (28.60), beating Argyle Whiskey. Will find this a bit tougher, cannot enthuse on this occasion.
